**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Daqo Changjiang Electric Co., Ltd. represents a tier-1, large-scale industrial manufacturing powerhouse in the electrical power transmission and distribution sector. Unlike many entities that exhibit scope inflation, Daqo's operational metrics are exceptionally robust and perfectly aligned with its heavy industry classification. The company boasts a massive fully paid-in capital of 110 million RMB and a highly significant workforce of 1,077 insured employees in 2024. Operating out of Yangzhong City (a known national hub for electrical equipment), it is a core subsidiary/affiliate of the renowned Daqo Group (@daqo.com). Its capabilities encompass the complete value chain of high/medium/low voltage switchgears, gas-insulated switchgear (GIS), and box-type substations, coupled with full electrical EPC engineering capabilities. This is a true industrial flagship.
